# Astro Marriage - Vedic Astrology Marriage Compatibility Analysis

## About
Astro Marriage is a web application that provides advanced Vedic astrology marriage compatibility analysis. It uses traditional Ashtakoot Milan, KP Astrology, Jaimini system, and modern psychological profiling to analyze marriage potential and partner compatibility.

## Features
- Self Analysis: Individual marriage potential score, spouse prediction, timing analysis
- Compatibility Analysis: Full partner comparison with Ashtakoot Milan scoring
- AI-Powered Insights: Gemini AI integration for personalized astrological guidance
- Risk Assessment: Divorce probability, infidelity risk, vulnerability timeline
- Psychological Profiling: Attachment styles, love languages, conflict tendencies
- Remedies: Personalized gemstone, mantra, and lifestyle recommendations

## Technology
Built with React, TypeScript, Vite, Zustand, Supabase, and Swiss Ephemeris (WASM).
Vedic calculations include: Ashtakoot Milan, Navamsa (D9), KP System, Chara Karakas, Upapada Lagna, and transit analysis.

## URL
https://astro-marriage.vercel.app
